Trade Fair
Emerald Luck Ring

Once in a while, the unit launches a spin attack, dealing 250000 physical damage to all enemies in a small radius around themself. Additionally, the ring wearer steals 20% health and fortitude for 4 sec from the affected enemies.

Requirements: 98-100
